summary: Add 'issuers find' subcommand, suggest issuer slugs on HTTP 400, append slug-convention + filter-combo tip to 'types search --help', and a PCGS cert cookbook entry.
reason: AGENTS.md Priority 1 + Priority 3 + Priority 4#3 — pp-numista session friction on PCGS-inventory enrichment showed agents waste quota guessing the underscore-vs-hyphen issuer slug, can't fuzzy-search a 127K-line issuer dump, and don't get help-text that nudges toward narrowing flags. All edits are hand-written and local-only; the error suggestion path never spends a quota call.
validated_outcome: Greptile P1: renderIssuersFind now early-returns on --quiet before the CSV/auto-JSON/human-table branches, so --quiet (incl. --json --quiet) suppresses all stdout per printOutputWithFlags' contract. TestRenderIssuersFindQuiet (3 modes) + TestRenderIssuersFindEmitsWhenNotQuiet PASS.
